baseline.reason: Misidentifies root cause: claims read_string() returning NULL is the issue, when the actual vulnerability is an uninitialized stack struct fileinfo fe (format_count==0 causes inner loop to never execute, leaving fe.name as garbage pointer). Also references incorrect line numbers.

vastdb.reason: Correctly identifies uninitialized fe.name (struct fileinfo fe) as root cause when DW_LNCT_path is absent/format_count==0. Accurately traces data flow: uninitialized fe.name stored via callback -> concat_filename -> IS_ABSOLUTE_PATH dereference. Minor imprecision about DW_LNCT_path omission vs format_count==0 trigger but conceptually sound.
